item.title: Extracellular Enzymes
item.description: Geochemistry and microbial ecology of extracellular enzymes in aquatic environments

item.title: Thawing Permafrost
item.description: Investigating carbon cycling in Arctic ecosystems as permafrost thaws due to climate change
